description_long: This is a heavy-duty pipe wrench with a robust metallic head and a long, cylindrical wooden handle. The head features an adjustable jaw mechanism, with visible gear teeth for tightening or loosening pipes, and a curved gripping section designed for maximum torque. The handle is made of polished wood, smoothly finished, and capped with a metallic ferrule where it meets the head. The wrench's body is primarily metallic, with a blue-painted shaft section connecting the head to the handle. The tool shows a utilitarian, industrial design, suitable for plumbing or mechanical work in urban environments. There are no visible brand markings, and the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
description: A sturdy pipe wrench with a metallic adjustable head and a smooth wooden handle, featuring a blue shaft and gear teeth for gripping pipes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular gripping jaw and the alignment of the handle behind the head.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the full length of the wooden handle, the blue shaft, and the detailed gear teeth of the adjustable jaw.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded end of the wooden handle and the back of the wrench head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other profile of the wrench, including the adjustment mechanism and the smooth transition from handle to head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical, smoothly finished, with a metallic ferrule at the head junction.
attribute_head_type: Adjustable pipe wrench head with gear teeth and a curved gripping jaw, made of steel.
